STRAINER.definition: A device used to separate solids from liquids by filtering.
STRAINER.example: She used a strainer to drain the pasta.

ELECTRON.definition: A stable subatomic particle with a negative electric charge.
ELECTRON.example: An electron orbits the nucleus of an atom.

TRAINED.definition: Having been taught a particular skill or type of behavior.
TRAINED.example: She is a trained nurse with ten years of experience.

TERRAIN.definition: A stretch of land, especially with regard to its physical features.
TERRAIN.example: The soldiers struggled across the rough terrain.

RETAINS.definition: Continues to have something; keeps possession of.
RETAINS.example: She retains a sharp memory despite her age.
